name: brownstone-careers-pages
description: Brownstone Careers Cloudflare Pages site with dynamic candidate bio-data, secure identity uploads, premium forms, SEO/GEO metadata, and unified form handling.

scripts.check: node scripts/check.mjs && node scripts/seo-audit.mjs && node --check functions/_shared.js && node --check functions/api/applications.js && node --check functions/api/contact.js && node --check functions/api/health.js
scripts.test: npm run check && node scripts/test-forms.mjs && npm run build
scripts.pages:deploy: npm run build && npx --yes wrangler@latest pages deploy --project-name brownstone-careers --branch main
